description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude female figure standing upright, holding a draped cloth that cascades from both hands to the ground. The figure is rendered in a classical style, with smooth, naturalistic contours and subtle anatomical detailing. Her hair is styled close to the head, and her facial features are softly defined, conveying a serene expression. The cloth she holds creates a gentle, flowing effect at her sides and feet, adding a sense of movement and grace. The surface of the sculpture has a dark, patinated finish, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal. The overall form is compact and solid, with a stable base that allows it to stand securely.
description: A classical-style bronze sculpture of a nude female figure holding a draped cloth, with smooth contours and a dark patinated finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal anatomy, facial features, and both hands holding the draped cloth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, torso, and the way the cloth falls along the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back anatomy, hair, and the cloth draping down from both hands to the ground.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the figure and the draped cloth along the right leg.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
